forgot.title: Reset Password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgot.confirmMessage: We've sent a reset link to:
forgot.confirmInstructions: Click the link in the email to reset your password.
forgot.checkSpam: If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.
forgot.linkExpires: The link will expire in 1 hour.

errors.rateLimitExceeded: Too many requests. Please wait {{seconds}} seconds.

reset.title: Set New Password
reset.subtitle: Enter the code you received via email
reset.passwordRequirements: Password must contain at least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number
reset.successMessage: Your password has been successfully reset

errors.expiredCode: This code has expired. Please request a new code.
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.networkError: Connection error. Please check your internet connection.

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.notAvailable: User registration is not yet available. Please contact an administrator to create your account.

errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
errors.emailNotVerified: Email not verified. Please check your inbox.
errors.accountLocked: Account locked. Try again in 15 minutes.
errors.networkError: Connection error. Please check your internet connection.
errors.unknownError: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.
